form.formComment: Scored by 5 lengths last time (19.96) in a Grade 5 over 350m at Goulburn. Has two wins and four placings from seven starts from the draw. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 520m at this track in 29.92, set up by a fast early sectional. Has a slick 29.79 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 520m at this track in 29.92, set up by a fast early sectional. Has a slick 29.79 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior was an impressive winner scoring by a neck in a Mix 1/2/3 at this track and clocking an excellent 29.76 for the 520m trip. Looks the one to beat on win two back.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 450m at Maitland. That followed a win two back in 22.23 beating Jakey Blue over 400m at Maitland. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (29.93) when fourth over 520m at this track in a Grade 5. Has one win and two placings from six starts from the draw. Tough line-up and may struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 340m boxes checked off heels, momentarily stumbled and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 520m at this track. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Placed last time (30.03) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 1.5 lengths. Has one success and two minors from six starts from box 7. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 5th on April 11 over 520m at this track behind Queen Era beaten 8 lengths (30.29) in a Grade 5. Leading chance on best form.
